ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "mkt_rf" REAL /* Market risk factor */,
  "smb" REAL /* Size factor */,
  "hml" REAL /* Value factor */,
  "rf" REAL /* Risk-free rate */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who created the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_compositions" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., junior, senior, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the analyst (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_portfolio_access" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the analyst to the portfolio (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id", "portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who made the change */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., portfolio created, analyst access updated) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
column_names: ID of the analyst who created the portfolio
Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive)
ID of the stock in the portfolio
Weight of the stock in the portfolio
Role of the analyst (e.g., junior, senior, admin)
Password of the analyst (hashed for security)
Access level of the analyst to the portfolio (e.g., read-only, read-write)

ID of the portfolio affected by the change
Type of change made (e.g., portfolio created, analyst access updated)
